# GRA Release Radar API context

Current API status: no first-party hosted analysis API.

The public OpenAPI file at /openapi.json documents static discovery and documentation resources only. The runtime application calls GitHub REST API endpoints from the user's browser. Agents should not call a fictional /api/analyze endpoint because it does not exist.

If a user asks how to automate analysis today, direct them to the browser URL pattern:
https://gra.caldis.me/?repo=owner/repo
